meaning: n.气氛,气味,(圣象头部的)光环 [医]先兆,预感
examples: She had an aura of authority.
She always has an aura of confidence.
The malls have that serene aura of undisturbed wilderness, with scarcely a shopper in sight.
Despite these developments, Papua New Guinea retains an aura of uncharted territory, with a decidedly nascent tourism infrastructure.
The mountain farms themselves add to this aura, being run using farming techniques little-changed since the Middle Ages.
